subject: english
title: Unit 8 Reader — The Bug Girl
subtitle: v1 · Sophia Spencer's insect passion · Ask Questions strategy · 14 slides

content: Read a biography about Sophia Spencer and her passion for insects.
Use the Ask Questions reading strategy to deepen comprehension.
Sequence key events in Sophia's story.
language: Use vocabulary words enjoy, collect, bug, fossil, alone, and dinosaur in context.
Ask and answer questions about a text using a two-column chart.
